user.title: Select Provider
user.description: Choose the cloud AI provider to configure.

credentials.title: Enter API Key
credentials.description: Enter your {provider} API key. The key will be validated before the entry is created.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter API Key
reauth_confirm.description: The {provider} API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

reconfigure.title: Update API Key
reconfigure.description: Enter a new API key for {provider}.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key — please check and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the provider. Check your network and try again.

user.title: Add AI task
user.description: Choose a language model for data generation.

data_description.model: The language model used for data generation.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the model response.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure AI task
reconfigure.description: Update the settings for this AI task.

data_description.model: The language model used for data generation.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the model response.

user.title: Add conversation agent
user.description: Choose a language model and configure its behaviour.

data_description.model: The language model used for conversation.
data_description.prompt: System prompt template (supports Home Assistant templates).
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select which Home Assistant APIs the AI can use to control your devices. 'Assist' exposes the same entities as the built-in voice assistant.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the model response.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure conversation agent
reconfigure.description: Update the settings for this conversation agent.

data_description.model: The language model used for conversation.
data_description.prompt: System prompt template (supports Home Assistant templates).
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select which Home Assistant APIs the AI can use to control your devices. 'Assist' exposes the same entities as the built-in voice assistant.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the model response.

user.title: Add speech-to-text service
user.description: Choose the speech-to-text model to use.

data_description.stt_model: The model used for speech-to-text transcription.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure speech-to-text service
reconfigure.description: Update the model for this speech-to-text service.

data_description.stt_model: The model used for speech-to-text transcription.
